extraction.one_line_summary: GAVIRIA Fernando won the 229km bunch sprint after DUMOULIN Tom's QuickStep delivered him through late-race compression chaos.
tactical_patterns: Zuppa Eugert attacked solo under 1km exploiting bunch compression through double curves before being caught.
UAE's Ferrari Roberto positioned maglia rosa Dumoulin late despite not having sprint leader, revealing protective tactical depth.
QuickStep delivered Gaviria through technical curves sub-1km rather than opening from 3km, adapting to compression risk.

rider_signals.ZUPPA Eugert: positive: Albanian showed unusual sprint-stage aggression by soloing under flamme rouge through technical section
rider_signals.MORESCO Andrea: positive: Second place suggests Wilier-Triestina's sprint train can function on mega-distance stages when others fade
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: neutral: Third after 229km indicates durability but QuickStep's technical positioning beat pure speed
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: neutral: UAE positioned him aggressively late despite no sprint interest, suggesting team anxiety about GC positioning
rider_signals.FRAILE Omar: positive: Proactively took final KOM points from break to extend jersey lead, showing classification awareness
